CustomField.description: Specifies the Opportunity Contact Role name assigned to Household members when the Household Contact Roles On setting is enabled. When an Opportunity is created for a Contact, all other members of the same Household receive an OCR with this role. Must match an existing Contact Role picklist value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Opportunity Contact Role to assign to Household members when automatic Household Contact Roles are enabled.
CustomField.label: Household Member Contact Role
